microsoft_ft: Scaled Azure's recovery validation from a 2-person operation into a platformized system, standardizing end-to-end workflows that sustain 45+ annual resilience drills and drove $14M+ impact across enterprise customers (Databricks, Walmart, SAP, NetApp).

Led 0→1 development of an internal Resilience Automation Platform, owning product requirements and self-service scheduling that cut operational toil 30% and transitioned drill execution to a scalable, customer-driven self-service model.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive resilience testing capability, delivering a rack-level drill program in 4 months with a 94% recovery rate, surfacing critical hardware defects and establishing a repeatable model for continuous field validation.

Directed 14 cross-org recovery executions under executive visibility, serving as bridge lead for a sovereign-cloud network isolation trial tied to a $1.5B+ enterprise contract and validating deployment-readiness requirements end to end.

Drove technical discovery with Azure service teams to map operational needs into solution designs, then led demos and workshops that built customer confidence and accelerated adoption of resilience tooling across diverse stakeholder audiences.

Scaled team leverage through AI-driven automation, building an internal AI agent and restructuring planning workflows that reduced planning cycle time 39% and increased drill capacity 21% while sustaining high-pressure, dynamic execution windows.
microsoft_2023: Championed product adoption for AI-driven code generation workflows, leading hands-on user demos and training sessions that drove utilization across 14 key teams and saved 37 engineering hours monthly through repeatable enablement.

Influenced the product roadmap to include intent-based YAML generation by facilitating 11+ structured user interviews with Azure service teams, capturing and synthesizing feedback to identify and prioritize critical feature gaps.

Optimized data integrity and retrieval by enforcing rigorous metadata standards and migrating documentation to an AI-powered semantic search tool, cutting lookup time 83% and improving self-service access for technical audiences.
microsoft_2022: Generated $3M in accelerated revenue and launched regions 28% faster by securing cross-functional alignment on a unified automation prioritization framework spanning 140+ engineering and operations teams.

Mobilized a product strategy to mitigate operational toil during region launches, running discovery with 20+ service teams to quantify 81 hours of manual effort per region and building a roadmap to automate critical deployment paths.
Enabled leadership to target automation gaps and prioritize high-impact support by engineering a Power BI dashboard that tracked operational toil and readiness signals across 140+ teams in real time.
amazon_robotics: Achieved zero operational downtime across a 2,000+ unit pilot transition by defining the legacy OS migration strategy and mapping dependencies across 1,200+ field stations to de-risk deployment.
Facilitated Agile ceremonies including sprint planning and retrospectives, prioritizing the backlog to resolve 40+ high-priority tickets and stabilize the developer intake and field-support process.

Drove strategic alignment between IT, Operations, and Engineering teams to implement automated CI/CD pipelines, accelerating the software deployment cycle 25% and improving release reliability for fielded systems.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings 26% by optimizing operations and managing the end-to-end scoping and invoicing lifecycle for 200+ monthly proposals through a new CRM-driven sales process.
Reduced Customer Acquisition Cost 13% and boosted conversions 2.7% by executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy that optimized the website and Google Business profile for high-intent buyers.
Improved leadership pricing models by conducting financial profitability analysis across 1,000+ project records, identifying and sealing margin leaks to inform data-backed quoting decisions.
